column1813:
This picture shows a classic American Chinese dish called "Dragon & Phoenix".

Dish composition: This dish consists of two parts, usually General Tso's Chicken on one side and Shrimp stir-fry on the other.

Symbolic meaning: In Chinese culture, the "dragon" represents the king of the sea (usually symbolizing shrimp or seafood), and the "phoenix" represents the king of birds (symbolizing chicken). The combination of the two signifies harmony and good fortune.

Flavor characteristics: Chicken is usually crispy, sweet and sour with a hint of spiciness, while shrimp is stir-fried with vegetables to provide a crisp texture.

Side dishes: Usually served with vegetables such as broccoli, carrots, baby corn and bell peppers.

Celebrate Life’s Most Important Moments with Urban Prime Catering
At Urban Prime Catering, we believe every event tells a story. Whether it is a wedding, corporate gathering, birthday celebration, or private dinner, our mission is to transform each moment into an unforgettable experience filled with exceptional food, thoughtful service, and genuine hospitality.
From elegant plated dinners to vibrant buffet presentations, our culinary team brings the same dedication and passion that has made Urban Prime an award-winning dining destination. We carefully select premium ingredients, prepare each dish with precision, and present every plate with pride.
But catering is more than food — it is about trust. Our clients invite us to be part of their most meaningful celebrations, and we are honored every time we are chosen to serve.
Our experienced team works closely with hosts, planners, venues, and vendors to ensure seamless execution from the first consultation to the final toast. Every detail matters. Every guest matters.
Whether you are planning an intimate gathering or a large celebration, Urban Prime Catering delivers the PRIME experience your guests will remember long after the last bite.
From weddings at beautiful venues like Bonita Ranch… to corporate events, milestone birthdays, anniversaries, and community celebrations… Urban Prime Catering is proud to serve the Space Coast with excellence.
Thank you to our incredible community for trusting us with your most special moments.

column1828:
PRIME Spirit
Faith Tuesday was created from my heart — a simple desire to break bread with our community, gather under one roof, and celebrate faith, gratitude, and togetherness.
In a world that often feels rushed and divided, Faith Tuesday is our moment to pause, reflect, pray, connect, and lift one another up. It is about family, friendship, compassion, and hope.
This Tuesday, March 31, from 4 PM – 8 PM, we invite you to join us on our Sunset Patio for a very special Early Easter celebration, featuring a thoughtfully extended menu and the blessing of live musicians to fill the evening with peace and inspiration.
We’ll be joined by the incredible Chris Johnson, who will grace us with wonderful live Christian music!
This gathering is meant to nourish both the soul and the spirit — a place where hearts are warmed, faith is renewed, and community becomes family.
At Urban Prime, we believe food is more than nourishment. It is love. It is comfort. It is connection. It is service. And above all, it is gratitude for God’s many blessings.
Let us come together to give thanks for life’s most precious gifts — our breath, our love, our hope, and one another.
May God’s grace surround you, His peace fill your heart, and His love guide your path.
Limited seating — we would be honored to welcome you.
God bless you all.
- Chef Ercan

column1998: All my reviews of this Longhorn have been 5 stars. Giving them a 4 for  yeterday. Ordered an app, which was great as always. Our steaks came out within mere minutes before I could barely touch my salad or the appetizer. My friend and I both ordered the 12 oz ribeye, cooked MR. I'm 99.9 percent  that I was served a ny strip. Both the server and manager insisted that mine was a ribeye. My friend and I also traded bites of each other's steaks, and both of us agreed that I was indeed served a strip, big difference in texture and marbling. I order the same thing every single time...and our steaks were completely different cuts. I will continue to give them my business, as they are my favorite. Hopefully this visit was a fluke.

🧗‍♂️ Cocoa Beach Aerial Adventures ropes course  
Tackle zip lines and ropes courses 45 feet up in the air for an exciting family challenge. With varying different challenge levels, there is a fitting challenge for everyone in the family. Test your problem solving skills and zip across the sky!
🏊‍♂️ Spend time at the hotel pool to relax and recharge.  
Soak up the sun right here at the hotel in our complimentary pool! Shallow areas for the kiddos, and comfortable lounge chairs for parents. Bring the family for games and splashing or find a quiet corner to read and unwind.
🏄‍♀️ Boogie boarding at the beach  
Grab boogie boards for fast, splashy fun in the shore break that’s perfect for beginners and fun for everyone! It's affordable, a quick learn for kids, and an active way to enjoy the waves together!
Find a new experience for your family here at Best Western Cocoa Beach - Port Canaveral!
column1813:
🏖️ Heading to Cocoa beach? Try new beach activities and make fresh memories in on your vacation with Best Western Cocoa Beach - Port Canaveral
🪁 Kite flying  
Feel the ocean breeze and watch colorful kites soar. It’s easy to learn, great for kids and adults alike, and perfect on windy mornings or afternoons. Appreciate the skyline with extra colors!
🏐 Beach volleyball  
Gather friends or join a pickup game to get moving and meet fellow beachgoers. Net setups are common near popular spots and offer fun, active competition. Plus you can hop in the water to cool off between games!
🏰 Sand castle building  
Get creative with buckets, molds, and simple tools to craft towers, moats, and sculptures. Turn it into a family contest or a relaxed solo project for hours of sandy fun. Impress others and become the best spot for photos on the beach!
Turn your vacation into one full of new experiences! Book with Best Western Cocoa Beach - Port Canaveral and fill your beach time with fun!

Begin each morning with a fresh, satisfying complimentary breakfast designed for every traveler. Enjoy hot options like eggs, breakfast meats, waffles and pancakes. We also have healthy choices such as yogurt, granola, parfaits, and fresh fruit. Our menu is fresh and rotates regularly! Sit down and relax, or grab something quick and convenient for those heading out early! And don’t to grab beverages such brewed coffee, assorted teas, fresh juices, and milk. 
Swing by our complimentary breakfast 7 days a week from 6:00–10:00 AM. Served in the dining area and ready for you each day!
column1823:
Thinking of a fun, family-friendly day near Best Western Cocoa Beach - Port Canaveral? Tee off and explore wildlife at Golf N Gator! Just a short drive away, enjoy a scenic 18-hole mini-golf course, Go-Carts, gem mining, arcade games and all while meeting everything from gators to exotic birds. Perfect afternoon after a beach morning for the whole family!
Book today and explore all of the fun activities Cocoa Beach has to offer!
column1828:
If you’re staying at Best Western Cocoa Beach – Port Canaveral, one of the easiest wins is right on property, Fish Camp Grill.
No driving, no planning, just walk over and sit down.
Fresh seafood, cold drinks, and a laid-back outdoor setup that fits the beach vibe without trying too hard. It’s the kind of place where you can show up straight from the sand and not feel out of place.
Lunch is quick and easy, dinner slows things down a bit more. Either way, it’s convenient without feeling like a typical “hotel restaurant.”
If you’re looking for something simple that still feels like part of the trip, Fish Camp Grill makes it easy.
column1833:
Yesterday evening, our team at Best Western Cocoa Beach - Port Canaveral had the opportunity to give back alongside the amazing crew at The Children's Hunger Project.

We spent the evening packing meals for local kids in Brevard County, helping make sure they have food to take home on the weekends. It’s a simple effort that makes a real impact.

Grateful to be part of a community that shows up for one another 💙
column1838:
Planning a cruise with the family usually comes down to one big question: where should we stay the night before?

At Best Western Cocoa Beach - Port Canaveral, it’s set up to make that decision easy, especially for families.
Here’s what families actually get when they stay here:

🏖️ Closest oceanfront hotel to Port Canaveral
You’re just a quick drive from the cruise terminals, so cruise day feels simple—not rushed.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Space that works for families
Room options that fit everyone comfortably, plus easy access in and out (huge when you’ve got luggage and kids).

🌊 Direct beach access
No packing up the car. Walk straight onto the sand and let the kids burn off energy before your trip.

🏊 Two pools + room to relax
Whether it’s a quick swim or winding down after travel, there’s space for everyone to enjoy.

🍳 Free breakfast to start the day right
One less stop to think about before heading to the port.

🍤 On-site dining at Fish Camp Grill
Easy dinner without having to load everyone back into the car.

If you're traveling with kids, convenience matters more than anything—and staying somewhere that’s right on the beach and minutes from the port just makes the whole trip smoother.

It’s the kind of place where your vacation actually starts before your cruise.
column1843:
What’s Actually Walkable from Cocoa Beach Hotels? 🚶‍♂️🌴
If you're staying at Best Western Cocoa Beach – Port Canaveral, you can skip the car more than you might think. Here’s what’s truly within walking distance (no guesswork):

🏖️ The Beach – 1 minute
Step out and you’re on the sand. No crossing highways or long boardwalks.

🎣 Cocoa Beach Pier – 2–4 minutes
Restaurants, drinks, shops, and ocean views all right there.

🍤 Fish Camp Grill (on-site) – 0 minutes
Poolside food and drinks without leaving the property.

☕ Coffee & Casual Eats – 3–8 minutes
A few easy spots nearby for breakfast, snacks, and quick bites.

🛍️ Surf Shops & Souvenirs – 5–10 minutes
Beachwear, sunscreen, and last-minute cruise items are all close.

Just a quick heads up on a couple spots nearby 👇

🚢 Port Canaveral – 5–10 minute drive
Super close and easy to reach with a quick drive or ride, especially with luggage on cruise day.

🛒 Major grocery stores – 5+ minute drive
A short trip gets you to full grocery options, while quick essentials are still available nearby.

Why this matters 👍
After a travel day, being able to walk to food, the beach, and attractions makes things easier, especially before cruise day.

No guessing. No long treks. Just simple, convenient access to what you actually need.
column1848:
🚢 Should You Stay the Night Before or After Your Cruise?

If you're sailing from Port Canaveral, staying the night before your cruise is a smart way to start your trip stress-free. Arrive early, relax by the beach, and wake up just minutes from the cruise terminals.

Many travelers also stay the night after their cruise to enjoy Cocoa Beach a little longer before heading home.

At Best Western Cocoa Beach Hotel & Suites, you're close to the beach, the Cocoa Beach Pier, and just a short drive from Port Canaveral — making it a convenient place to stay before or after your cruise.

🌴 Turn your cruise into a longer vacation.
column1853:
What Makes a Hotel Truly Family-Friendly Before a Cruise?
🏖️ Direct Beach Access
Kids have energy. A lot of it.
Being able to walk straight from your room to the sand makes a huge difference. No loading the car. No parking. No long walks with beach bags.
At Best Western Cocoa Beach, families can spend the afternoon building sandcastles, swimming, or just letting the kids burn off excitement before cruise day.
🚢 Close to Port Canaveral
Cruise morning should be simple.
Best Western Cocoa Beach is just minutes from Port Canaveral, which means:
• Short ride to the terminal
• Less stress with luggage
• Easier coordination for larger families
• Extra sleep on cruise morning
When you’re traveling with kids, convenience matters.
🏊 Pools for After-Beach Fun
Not every child wants waves all day.
Two outdoor pools give families options. After the beach, the pool becomes the perfect place to unwind while parents relax nearby.
🍳 Free Breakfast Included
Mornings before a cruise can feel rushed.
Having breakfast included on property means:
• No searching for restaurants
• No extra stop before the port
• Everyone eats before boarding
It keeps things simple, which is key with kids.
🛏️ Room Options for Families
Family trips mean more luggage and more space needs.
Best Western Cocoa Beach offers a variety of room types, including oceanfront options. Whether you need multiple beds or just want that balcony view to start vacation early, flexibility helps families settle in comfortably.

column1818:
Manatees, Mocktails, and Music!

Join Merritt Island Wildlife Association and Playalinda Brewing Company for an evening celebrating one of Florida's most iconic aquatic mammals. Manatees, Mocktails, and Music combines wildlife education, interactive activities, and a laid-back social atmosphere for a unique summer experience.

Throughout the evening, wildlife biologists will share fascinating facts about manatee biology, behavior, habitat, and conservation while guests explore hands-on education stations designed for all ages. Learn how manatees use Merritt Island National Wildlife Refuge and surrounding waterways, discover the challenges these gentle giants face, and find out how you can help protect them.

Be sure to visit the life-size manatee banner photo station to capture a memorable photo and complete all education stations to be entered into free raffle prize drawings. Guests can also browse exclusive manatee-themed merchandise, with all proceeds benefiting Merritt Island Wildlife Association's conservation and education efforts supporting the manatees that live freely within Merritt Island National Wildlife Refuge.

Enjoy the relaxing sounds of live string music, sample a refreshing mocktail creation or your favorite Playalinda brew, and leave with a deeper appreciation for one of Florida's most treasured wildlife species.

Fresh, flavorful, and available tomorrow only. See you at Taco Dive.
column1813:
We don't have a huge menu, and that's by design.

At Taco Dive, we'd rather focus on doing a few things really well. From tacos and bowls to appetizers and burritos, every item is made with quality ingredients, bold flavors, and the attention it deserves.

Simple menu. Big flavor. That's how we do it.
column1818:
Tomorrow's special is comfort food done the Taco Dive way.

Our Chicken & Waffle features a buttermilk-marinated chicken breast, fried to order and served with crispy bacon, an over-easy egg, and a deep-fried waffle. Finished with a drizzle of sour cream and maple syrup for the perfect sweet and savory bite.

Trust us, this is one you'll want to get your hands on.
column1823:
Tomorrow’s special is bringing a little island flavor to Taco Dive. 🌴🍤

Our Hawaiian BBQ Shrimp features grilled BBQ shrimp and sweet pineapple served over a bed of slaw, topped with fresh tomato, red onion, and fried fresco cheese. We finish it all with a drizzle of our house-made chipotle lime sauce for the perfect balance of sweet, smoky, and spicy.

Available tomorrow only. Come hungry.
column1828:
Don't forget, your Taco Dive favorites are just a few clicks away! 🌮
Order online for pickup and enjoy your favorite tacos, bowls, and more whenever the craving hits.

Fresh. Fast. Easy.
column1833:
Tomorrow, one of our favorite specials is back! 🔥

🥢 Asian Chicken Taco
Crispy panko-fried chicken thighs tossed in sweet chili sauce and served over a fresh kimchi slaw. Finished with green onions, sesame seeds, and a drizzle of sriracha mayo.

Sweet, spicy, crunchy, and packed with flavor. Stop by and give it a try!
column1838:
Well… tomorrow’s special is one we already know some of you have been waiting for.

Pork Schnitzel.
Buttermilk-marinated boneless pork chops, hand-breaded and fried to order, served over pickled red cabbage, drizzled with Dive Sauce, and finished with a fresh lemon wedge.
It’s crispy, comforting, a little nostalgic, and honestly the kind of special that makes people plan their Friday around it.

See you tomorrow at Taco Dive. 🌮
column1843:
Tomorrow’s special is the kind of flavor you don’t want to miss.

Savory, cheesy, bold, and packed with flavor in every bite. Come by tomorrow and try it while it lasts.

The best meals don't end with the main course — they end with something sweet. Sweet tooth fans from Cape Canaveral, Port Canaveral, and Cocoa already know that Papa Vito's Italian Restaurant and Pizza Kitchen is the place to be for the perfect dessert. Our freshly prepared Italian desserts like Cannoli, Tiramisu, and Vanilla Bean Cheesecake are made daily, because a dessert this good deserves the same care as everything else on our menu.

Our Cannoli are filled with sweet ricotta cheese, our Tiramisu offers a light, coffee-soaked sponge cake, and our Vanilla Bean Cheesecake is rich, smooth, and completely irresistible. These aren't afterthoughts — they're the kind of desserts people plan their visit around. Add one to your meal or delivery order for the ultimate Italian dining experience.

These aren't afterthoughts — they're the kind of desserts people plan their visit around. Head to our website to add one of these treats to your order today and give your meal the ending it deserves. Trust us — you won't want to skip dessert.
column1813:
here’s something special about a place that feels like home the moment you walk in. Papa Vito’s Italian Restaurant and Pizza Kitchen has been that place for families, friends, and colleagues looking for great food and an even better atmosphere. From intimate dinners to full-scale events, our dining room is built for moments worth celebrating.

From birthday celebrations to office parties, we provide everything you need to make your event a success. Our family-style catering service features handmade pastas, gourmet pizzas, and all the authentic flavors of Italy — for up to 150 people with just 24 hours’ notice. Every detail is handled with the same care we put into every plate we serve.

Neighbors from Audubon, Merritt Island, and Cocoa Beach have trusted us to make their gatherings memorable — and we’d love to do the same for you. Give us a call today to book your catering and let’s start planning something unforgettable. Great food, great people, and a space that brings it all together.
column1818:
Craving a taste of Florida with an Italian twist? At Papa Vito’s Italian Restaurant and Pizza Kitchen, our Garlic Shrimp blends local Florida shrimp with classic Italian flavors, featuring fresh basil and a rich garlic sauce that’s bold, bright, and completely irresistible. Each shrimp is cooked fresh to order, ensuring a meal that’s both flavorful and satisfying every single time.

Diners from Port Canaveral, Cocoa, and Rockledge have been coming in just for this dish — and it’s easy to see why. It’s the perfect plate to enjoy with a refreshing glass of wine or paired with a pasta of your choice. Coastal dining with a touch of Italian tradition doesn’t get better than this.

Whether you’re dining in or ordering from home, this is one dish you don’t want to miss. Visit our website to place your order and bring a little taste of the coast to your table tonight. One bite and you’ll be hooked.
column1823:
Looking for the perfect spot for date night? Guests from Merritt Island, Cocoa Beach, and Cape Canaveral know that Papa Vito's Italian Restaurant and Pizza Kitchen is the go-to spot for a special evening out. Our Chicken Parmigiana and Penne served with homemade Mama's Sauce and fresh pasta is the kind of meal that sets the mood right.

Treat yourself to one of our Italian favorites made fresh every day, because a great date night starts with great food. Our cozy atmosphere and generous portions make it easy to slow down, enjoy the moment, and savor every bite. It's the kind of dinner experience that brings you back again and again.

Top it off with our "Buy 1 Dinner, Get 1 50% Off" deal and 2-for-1 house wines during Happy Hour from 3-6 pm, and you've got an evening worth remembering. Give us a call to book your table today and let us take care of the rest. Date night just got a whole lot better.
column1828:
Make game day even better with Vito’s Wings at Papa Vito’s Italian Restaurant and Pizza Kitchen! With five flavor options, including spicy and BBQ, these wings are the perfect appetizer to share with friends while watching the game. Pair them with our cheese bread and dipping sauces like Ranch or Bleu Cheese to complete the ultimate game day spread.

Our wings are always hot, fresh, and ready to make your game day more enjoyable. They’re the kind of crowd-pleaser that disappears fast, so make sure you order enough for everyone. From the first wing to the last, every bite is worth it.

The go-to game day order for fans in Cocoa, Rockledge, and Audubon — Vito’s Wings never miss. Head to our website to place your order for pickup or delivery and get game day started the right way. Your crew will thank you.
column1833:
For those wanting a break from the red sauce, our White Pizza at Papa Vito’s Italian Restaurant and Pizza Kitchen is exactly what you’ve been looking for. Made with ricotta, fresh herbs, and the finest gourmet Italian pizza ingredients, this pizza delivers a creamy, garlic, and herb profile that’s anything but ordinary. It’s a lighter, herb-infused alternative that proves you don’t need red sauce to make an unforgettable slice.

Regulars from Cocoa Beach, Cape Canaveral, and Port Canaveral have been quietly obsessing over this one — and now it’s your turn to find out why. This pizza is perfect for anyone craving something new, yet still loaded with fresh, flavorful ingredients. It’s a great way to switch things up without ever sacrificing quality.

Whether you’re a longtime fan or trying it for the first time, this slice never disappoints. Give us a call today to order your White Pizza for delivery or pick-up, and we’ll have it ready before you know it. One bite and you’ll wonder why you ever stuck to red sauce.
column1838:
Discover one of our hidden gems at Papa Vito's Italian Restaurant and Pizza Kitchen — and people from Rockledge, Audubon, and Merritt Island already know exactly what it is. Stuffed with creamy ricotta cheese and topped with melted mozzarella, Manicotti is a classic Italian dish that takes you right to Italy with every bite. It's a traditional baked specialty that makes for the perfect comfort meal any night of the week.

Our Manicotti is served with a side of dinner salad and garlic knots, making it the ideal meal to satisfy your cravings. Don't just take our word for it — this is the dish that keeps our regulars coming back week after week. Once you try it, it's hard to order anything else.

This hidden gem deserves a spot on your regular rotation, and we think you'll understand why after the first bite. Check out our website to place your order today and enjoy this traditional favorite made fresh and served with love. It's the kind of dish that keeps our regulars coming back week after week.
column1843:

It’s award-winning pizza that stands out from the usual fast food, giving you the best pizza experience around. Our Papa Vito’s Special pizza, made with fresh dough and a perfect blend of toppings, is the kind of meal that brings everyone to the table. Whether you’re feeding a crowd or keeping it cozy, there’s a pizza here for every kind of night.

From Cape Canaveral and Port Canaveral to Cocoa, families keep coming back because they know this is the real deal. Give us a call to place your order and we’ll have your pizza hot and ready when you need it. We’re here to make your pizza night one to remember.
column1848:

It’s the kind of mid-week indulgence that makes the rest of the week worth it.

column1998:
Sitting outside with nice, but you are looking at a parking lot. The food was average. Except for the Kentucky Derby cake. It was very disappointing. I had the Rosemary's Baby drink and it was good but small especially for the price. The wagyu was good but the chimichurri lacked, so get the au poiver instead. The lobster roll was very good. Overall okay establishment. Spent $160 for two people. Not sure I would go again because the service was lacking. Took almost half an hour to get the desert so I had to get it to go. And then when we ate it, it just was so disappointing, so dry, not even as moist as a Betty Crocker. It is not a Kentucky Derby chocolate cake.
dessert inspired by the traditional "Kentucky Derby pie, often featuring dark chocolate, Kentucky bourbon, and pecans"
It was just plain chocolate cake and dry. Actually, the best part of the meal was the musician that was there. His card is pictured.
Will Purdy, and I usually don't like music while I'm eating because it's typically too loud. He was fantastic. I would go to a different place if he was playing there.
So the food was all medium-grade food the drinks medium grade because it's very expensive and there are other places that do it just as well. Tracy's makes a better Smashburger. And in viera, the Venezia wine restaurant is much better. With a nice atmosphere.

Planning food for the Big Game doesn’t have to be a guessing game.

The Pizza Hut Pizza Calculator helps you figure out how many pizzas to order based on your group size, so you’re ready for kickoff and everything that follows. It’s a quick, simple way to plan your watch party without stress.

Pizza planning tips for game day:

Small watch party (4–6 people): 2–3 pizzas
Medium group (7–10 people): 4–5 pizzas
Large group (11+ people): plan for 1 pizza per 2–3 people

If pizza is the main event, it’s smart to plan a little extra. Adding wings or sides can help balance different appetites and keep everyone happy through the entire game.

Use the Pizza Calculator to plan ahead, then place your delivery or pickup order when it’s convenient. More planning now means more time to enjoy the Big Game later.

Planning food for the Big Game doesn’t have to be a guessing game.

The Pizza Hut Pizza Calculator helps you figure out how many pizzas to order based on your group size, so you’re ready for kickoff and everything that follows. It’s a quick, simple way to plan your watch party without stress.

Pizza planning tips for game day:

Small watch party (4–6 people): 2–3 pizzas
Medium group (7–10 people): 4–5 pizzas
Large group (11+ people): plan for 1 pizza per 2–3 people

If pizza is the main event, it’s smart to plan a little extra. Adding wings or sides can help balance different appetites and keep everyone happy through the entire game.

Use the Pizza Calculator to plan ahead, then place your delivery or pickup order when it’s convenient. More planning now means more time to enjoy the Big Game later.

Planning food for the Big Game doesn’t have to be a guessing game.

The Pizza Hut Pizza Calculator helps you figure out how many pizzas to order based on your group size, so you’re ready for kickoff and everything that follows. It’s a quick, simple way to plan your watch party without stress.

Pizza planning tips for game day:

Small watch party (4–6 people): 2–3 pizzas
Medium group (7–10 people): 4–5 pizzas
Large group (11+ people): plan for 1 pizza per 2–3 people

If pizza is the main event, it’s smart to plan a little extra. Adding wings or sides can help balance different appetites and keep everyone happy through the entire game.

Use the Pizza Calculator to plan ahead, then place your delivery or pickup order when it’s convenient. More planning now means more time to enjoy the Big Game later.

Planning food for the Big Game doesn’t have to be a guessing game.

The Pizza Hut Pizza Calculator helps you figure out how many pizzas to order based on your group size, so you’re ready for kickoff and everything that follows. It’s a quick, simple way to plan your watch party without stress.

Pizza planning tips for game day:

Small watch party (4–6 people): 2–3 pizzas
Medium group (7–10 people): 4–5 pizzas
Large group (11+ people): plan for 1 pizza per 2–3 people

If pizza is the main event, it’s smart to plan a little extra. Adding wings or sides can help balance different appetites and keep everyone happy through the entire game.

Use the Pizza Calculator to plan ahead, then place your delivery or pickup order when it’s convenient. More planning now means more time to enjoy the Big Game later.
